case_title: YINYIN HOOGENRAAD VS. SOMA ENDODONTICS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HOOGENRAAD, YINYIN AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA ENDODONTICS HORST, ORAPIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SOMA ENDODONTICS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 SERVED MAR-14-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA ENDODONTICS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF YINYIN HOOGENRAAD APPEARED. DEFENDANT SOMA ENDODONTICS, REPRESENTED BY ORAPIN HORST, OWNER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOOGENRAAD, YINYIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOMA ENDODONTICS HORST, ORAPIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
